questionText: Provide details on your reporting boundary.
questionKo: CDP 보고에 적용한 보고경계에 대한 세부 정보를 입력하십시오 .
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Biodiversity, Plastics, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: This question helps data users interpret how your responses relate to your business operations. Your response to this question defines the set of entities (companies, businesses, other groups, etc.) that you are providing data for in the CDP questionnaire.

columns.text: Is your reporting boundary for your CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statements?
options: Not applicable - we do not publicly disclose financial statements
columns.textKo: 보고경계 귀사의 CDP disclosure the same as that used in your 재무제표 여부를 선택하십시오.
optionsKo: Not 해당되는 경우 - we do not publicly disclose 재무제표

columns.text: How does your reporting boundary differ to that used in your financial statement?
columns.popup_help: This question is asking to describe your reporting boundary compared to that used in your financial statement. You will be able to report exclusions later in the disclosure framework.
columns.textKo: How does your 보고경계 differ to that used in your financial statement?
columns.popup_helpKo: This 문항 is asking to 설명 your 보고경계 compared to that used in your financial statement. You will be able to report 제외사항 later in the disclosure framework.

guidance.text:
General 
The reporting boundary defines the set of entities (companies, businesses, other groups, etc.) that you are providing data for.
Unless stated otherwise, the information you provide in response to CDP's corporate questionnaire should be presented as one result covering all the entities indicated as falling within your reporting boundary in this question.
Throughout this questionnaire, "your organization" and "organization-wide" will be used to refer collectively to the entities included within the reporting boundary defined here.
CDP recommends that you consult your legal or accounting advisor when determining your reporting boundary.
Note that you will be requested to indicate the consolidation approach chosen to calculate environmental performance data (e.g., GHG emissions, water withdrawals, deforestation- and conversion-free status of commodity volumes, etc.) to your organization in 6.1.
Is your reporting boundary for your CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statement? (column 1) 
Using a reporting boundary aligned with the reporting boundary used for your financial accounting is preferable, as it is important for consistency and accountability.
CDP is committed to deliver comprehensive and robust environmental data to the market by aligning with global standards. Using the same reporting boundary as that used in your financial statements aligns with the requirements of the IFRS and ESRS reporting standards.
How does your reporting boundary differ to that used in your financial statement (column 2) 
This column is only presented if "No" is selected in column 1 "Is your reporting boundary for your CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statement?".
Provide details on why your reporting boundary is not the same as the reporting boundary used in the preparation of financial statements. Include details as to how the reporting boundary differs from your financial statements, such as any entities included in your financial reporting that are not included in your CDP response.  
If there are entities included in your consolidated accounting group that are not included in your reporting boundary, provide details on the exclusion of these entities from your environmental performance data in question 7.4.1, 8.1.1, and 9.1.1, where applicable.
Note on IFRS S1 Alignment 
The questionnaire was not reviewed for alignment with IFRS S1 General Requirements for Disclosure of Sustainability-related Financial Information in its entirety. To comply with the requirements of IFRS Sustainability Disclosure Standards, disclosing organizations are required to apply both IFRS S1 and IFRS S2.
guidance.textKo: 일반 The 보고경계 defines the set of entities (companies, businesses, other groups, etc.) that you are providing data for. Unless stated otherwise, the information you provide in response to CDP's corporate questionnaire 해야 합니다 be presented as one result covering all the entities indicated as falling within your 보고경계 in this 문항. Throughout this questionnaire, "귀사" 및 "organization-wide" will be used to refer collectively to the entities included within the 보고경계 defined here. CDP recommends that you consult your legal 또는 accounting advisor 경우 determining your 보고경계. Note that you will be requested to indicate the consolidation approach chosen to calculate environmental performance data (e.g., 온실가스 배출량, water withdrawals, deforestation- 및 conversion-free status of commodity volumes, etc.) to 귀사 in 6.1. Is your 보고경계 귀사의 CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statement? (열 1) Using a 보고경계 aligned with the 보고경계 used 귀사의 financial accounting is preferable, as it is important for consistency 및 accountability. CDP is committed to deliver comprehensive 및 robust environmental data to the market by aligning with global 기준. Using the same 보고경계 as that used in your 재무제표 aligns with the requirements 의 IFRS 및 ESRS reporting 기준. How does your 보고경계 differ to that used in your financial statement (열 2) This 열 is only presented 만약 "아니요" is 선택 in 열 1 "Is your 보고경계 귀사의 CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statement?". 세부 정보를 입력 on why your 보고경계 is not the same as the 보고경계 used in the preparation of 재무제표. Include details as to how the 보고경계 differs from your 재무제표, such as 하나 이상 entities included in your financial reporting that are not included in your CDP response. 만약 there are entities included in your consolidated accounting group that are not included in your 보고경계, 세부 정보를 입력 on the exclusion 의se entities from your environmental performance data in 문항 7.4.1, 8.1.1, 및 9.1.1, 여기서 해당되는 경우. Note on IFRS S1 Alignment The questionnaire was not reviewed for alignment with IFRS S1 일반 Requirements for Disclosure of Sustainability-related Financial Information in its entirety. To comply with the requirements of IFRS Sustainability Disclosure 기준, disclosing organizations are required to apply both IFRS S1 및 IFRS S2.

guidance.text:
The organization uses the same reporting boundary as the boundary used in the preparation of their financial statements.
The reporting boundary is applied consistently throughout reporting. Where relevant, the organization provides information on the value chain outside of the boundary as supplementary information relating to the dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities identified by the organization.
guidance.textKo: The organization uses the same 보고경계 as the boundary used in the preparation 의ir 재무제표. The 보고경계 is applied consistently throughout reporting. 여기서 relevant, the organization provides information on the 가치사슬 outside 의 boundary as supplementary information relating to the dependencies, impacts, risks, 및 opportunities identified by the organization.

guidance.text:
Financial statements: a structured representation of the financial position, financial performance, and cash flows of an entity according to the accounting principles used by the entity.
Organization: throughout this questionnaire, "your organization" and "organization-wide" refer collectively to all the companies, businesses, other groups etc. that fall within the definition of your reporting boundary (provided in 1.5). This term is used interchangeably with "your company", but CDP recognizes that some disclosing organizations may not consider themselves to be, or be formally classified, as "companies". 
Reporting boundary:  this determines which organizational entities, such as groups, businesses, and companies, are included in or excluded from your disclosure. Please consistently apply this organizational boundary when responding to questions unless you are specifically asked for data about another category of activities.
guidance.textKo: 재무제표: a structured representation 의 financial position, financial performance, 및 cash flows of an entity according to the accounting principles used by the entity. Organization: throughout this questionnaire, "귀사" 및 "organization-wide" refer collectively to all the companies, businesses, other groups etc. that fall within the definition of your 보고경계 (입력 in 1.5). This term is used interchangeably with "your company", but CDP recognizes that some disclosing organizations may not consider themselves to be, 또는 be formally classified, as "companies". 보고경계: this determines which organizational entities, such as groups, businesses, 및 companies, are included in 또는 excluded from your disclosure. Please consistently apply this 조직경계 경우 responding to questions unless you are specifically asked for data about another category of activities.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'Is your reporting boundary for your CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statements?' - 1/1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No' selected in column 'Is your reporting boundary for your CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statements?' - 0/1 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'Not applicable - we do not publicly disclose financial statements' selected in column 'Is your reporting boundary for your CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statements?' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: Management 점수를 획득하려면 Awareness에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 경로 A) '예' 선택 in 열 'Is your 보고경계 귀사의 CDP disclosure the same as that used in your 재무제표?' - 1/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) '아니요' 선택 in 열 'Is your 보고경계 귀사의 CDP disclosure the same as that used in your 재무제표?' - 0/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/1점입니다. 또는 경로 C) 'Not 해당되는 경우 - we do not publicly disclose 재무제표' 선택 in 열 'Is your 보고경계 귀사의 CDP disclosure the same as that used in your 재무제표?' - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

'Yes' selected in column 'Is your reporting boundary for your CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statements?' - 1/1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No' selected in column 'Is your reporting boundary for your CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statements?' - 0/1 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'Not applicable - we do not publicly disclose financial statements' selected in column 'Is your reporting boundary for your CDP disclosure the same as that used in your financial statements?' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

simpleHelpKo: This 문항 helps 데이터 사용자 interpret how your responses relate to your business operations. Your response to this 문항 defines the set of entities (companies, businesses, other groups, etc.) that you are providing data for in the CDP questionnaire.
